zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger de Lucy於大約1213年出生在英國波藍德艾格雷蒙特時，他的父親Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland32歲，母親Ada de Morville30歲。他至少有1個兒子和1個女兒。他去世於大約1274年在英國英格蘭波藍德考可爾姆斯享年63歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Roger de Lucy于大约1213年出生在英国波藍德艾格雷蒙特时，他的父亲Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland32岁，母亲Ada de Morville30岁。他至少有1个儿子和1个女儿。他去世于大约1274年在英国英格兰波藍德考可爾姆斯享年63岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Lucy
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish and English: variant of   Lucey  .
French: habitational name from any of various places called Lucy, originally named with the Latin personal name Lucius + the locative suffix -acum.

variants.name: Lucey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Maeve, Niall.

Irish: shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Luasaigh, an altered form of Mac Cluasaigh, a Cork name meaning ‘son of Cluasach’, a byname originally denoting someone with large or otherwise noticeable ears (from cluas ‘ear’).

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger de Lucy was born about 1213, in Egremont, Cumberland, England, his father, Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland, was 32 and his mother, Ada de Morville, was 30. He had at least 1 son and 1 daughter. He died about 1274, in Cockermouth, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 63.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger de Lucy est né environ 1213, à Egremont, Cumberland, Angleterre, son père, Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Ada de Morville, avait 30 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé environ 1274, à Cockermouth, Cumberland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 63 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Roger de Lucy um 1213 in Egremont, Cumberland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland 32 und seine Mutter Ada de Morville 30. Er hatte mindestens 1 Sohn und 1 Tochter. Er starb um 1274 im Alter von 63 Jahren in Cockermouth, Cumberland, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger de Lucy è nato il circa 1213 nel Egremont, Cumberland, England, il suo padre, Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland, aveva 32 anni e il suo madre, Ada de Morville, aveva 30 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 1 figlia. Morì circa 1274, nel Cockermouth, Cumberland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 63 anni.

ko.lifeSummary: Roger de Lucy(이)가 대략 1213년 영국 c벌랜드 그렘트에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland(은)는 32세였고, 그의 어머니 Ada de Morville(은)는 30세였다. 그는 적어도 한 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1274년 영국 잉글랜드 c벌랜드 콕모우스에서 63세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger de Lucy родился около 1213 г. в местности эгремонт, кумбирланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard de Lucy Lord of Egremont and Coupland было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Ada de Morville, 30. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 1 дочь. Он умер около 1274 г. в местности коккирмоут, кумбирланд, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 63 лет.
